moisture.w_sd_basis: spatial spread across the 198 source-box cells on the RECON annual basis (box-vs-parcel proxy uncertainty); structural sigma_method from the live WAM2layers ensemble is deferred to Phase 1B and not yet folded in
caveats: INTENSIVE source-to-sink kernel, NOT parcel-specific attribution
DJF AMSSRAB w=0.330 is seasonal corroboration that runs ABOVE annual by design; not the annual headline and not a discrepancy
A_source is the parcel area, NEVER the ~51.6M-ha source box (~160x trap)

scenario_axis.note: named stress axis, not a probability over futures; do not pool low/central/high as an interval

outputs.var_basis: epistemic parameter-uncertainty; credible interval on EXPECTED annual loss; NOT an aleatory year-to-year tail; aleatory frequency + price volatility deferred to Phase 2
outputs.var_scope: UK-attributable book (s_uk-gated); SECONDARY to the headline asset_per_ha_usd
outputs.var_exposure_caveat: VaR/ES are gated by s_uk (LOW-confidence PLACEHOLDER, params.S_UK; Trase/UN Comtrade/FAOSTAT pending); s_uk gates the UK VaR ONLY, never the headline USD/ha (which uses total downwind loss, independent of s_uk).
outputs.headline_metric: asset_per_ha_usd_p5_p50_p95 (30-yr NPV, total downwind, independent of s_uk)

cross_checks.engine_annual_equiv_basis: back-out = central P50 NPV / annuity(median r=0.08, T=30); cross-checked against the engine's direct median(rev_loss_usd)/A_source (self-consistent within rounding).
cross_checks.like_for_like_note: NPV $/ha vs land price (NPV-vs-NPV); engine annual-equiv vs Baker (annual-vs-annual). NEVER compare the 30-yr NPV directly to an annual flow.

validation_gates.detail: Amazon->La Plata 21.5% within Zemp 2014 [12,35]%; w=0.2034 (RECON annual). Verdict parsed from the data/moisture/gate1_report.md decision line.

WAM/UTrack/WaterSip 16.2-20.4% DJF; DJF w=0.330 runs ABOVE annual BY DESIGN (seasonal corroboration of the FRACTION, not an annual headline). DJF SEASON ONLY; the full 4-season annual ensemble (like-for-like vs RECON 0.2034) is bandwidth-limited and deferred (Phase 1B). Verdict parsed from gate1b_report.md.
CONCURRENT sign/rank only; financial backtest is an OBSERVED actual-vs-trend counterfactual, not an engine prediction.

coverage is a distribution-free FLOOR (>=1-2a = 80% at a=0.10), NOT a calibrated 90%; jackknife+ over ~22 event-year blocks (286 pooled state-years collapse to ~22 by intra-year spatial correlation) - the CONCURRENT-UQ unit, DISTINCT from the ~5 independent-event effective-n that governs any forecast-SKILL claim (Gate F). Indicative, not prudential-grade.
Gate F not run: no lead-time forecast experiment has been executed or validated.

claims_allowed.statement: Scenario simulation is live for the validated corridor.
claims_allowed.caveat: low/central/high f_loss are NAMED STRESSES, not calibrated probabilities; do not pool them as an interval.

Sign/rank only, NOT severe-drought magnitude; this is CONCURRENT validation, not forecast skill. The 2021/22 financial backtest is an OBSERVED actual-vs-trend counterfactual, not an engine prediction.
DESCRIPTIVE only and firewalled from price: it cannot modify f_loss, w_soybelt, A_source_ha, the USD/ha, or VaR. Not an early-warning or price/harvest forecast.
EPISTEMIC parameter-uncertainty only (credible interval on EXPECTED annual loss); must carry var_basis; NOT a year-to-year aleatory tail; aleatory variability is Phase 2.

claims_allowed.statement: Avoided-loss USD/ha may be reported as a scenario range.
claims_allowed.caveat: Reported as a RANGE (f_loss not backtested); a 30-yr NPV LOWER BOUND (water + one crop + one sink). Compare like-for-like: NPV vs land price ($295/ha), annual-flow vs Baker ($59.40/ha/yr) - never NPV vs an annual figure.

claims_forbidden.reason: No lead-time skill has passed any gate; current validation is concurrent, not predictive.
Resilience / condition signals are descriptive and lagging, never a forecast.
ET/condition anomalies are descriptive and partly corroborated, not validated service-loss drivers; coupling them to price is unvalidated and forbidden.
s_uk is a low-confidence placeholder; the UK VaR is indicative until real trade/exposure data lands.
Outputs are indicative, not prudential-grade; coverage is a FLOOR (>=1-2a), never a calibrated 95 percent; effective n ~ event-years.

provenance.source: RECON moisture-flow cube (De Petrillo, Monaco et al., Politecnico di Torino; Zenodo 14191920; UTrack-based, ERA5-reconciled via Iterative Proportional Fitting, 2008-2017)
provenance.method: intensive source-box -> sink-box fraction (RECON annual); Gate-1 4a 21.5% in [12,35]%
f_loss scenario range; lower bound (water + one crop + one sink)

epistemic parameter-uncertainty; credible interval on EXPECTED annual loss; NOT an aleatory year-to-year tail; aleatory frequency + price volatility deferred to Phase 2; gated by s_uk placeholder (UK VaR only, not the headline USD/ha)

provenance.source: INCRA Atlas do Mercado de Terras 2025 (ref. Dec 2024), AM-1502
provenance.method: all-use VTI R$1,525.62/ha x FX BRL->USD 0.1934; like-for-like vs the 30-yr NPV

provenance.source: Baker et al. 2026, Comms Earth & Environment 7:150, doi:10.1038/s43247-025-03159-3
provenance.method: published US$59.40/ha/yr; per-ha sd inherited from $20+/-7 bn/yr aggregate; compare to engine annual-equiv, NOT the 30-yr NPV
CONCURRENT sign/rank; cluster-robust p~0.004 over ~22 event-years (not n=286)
dominant uncertainty driver -> live WAM2layers ensemble is the Phase-1B priority
